description.value:
Thermal goggles that reveal hidden bodies and other heat sources in low lighting.

Effect: The wearer suffers no penalties due to darkness and gains +20 to vision-based Perception Tests at night. Poor models are bulky goggles with glowing lenses; Good and Best models resemble eyeglasses.

Notes: -
